questions.question: What boilerplate does <script setup> eliminate compared to a regular <script> with setup()?
options: The need to import Vue APIs like ref and computed
The export default, setup() function, and return statement
The need to declare props and emits

questions.question: Which of these is a compiler macro available in <script setup> that does NOT need to be imported?
When do you still need a regular <script> block alongside <script setup>?
options: When using v-model on the component
When setting inheritAttrs: false or declaring named exports
